title: From 8B to Frontier: How System Prompts Control Whether AI Agents Blackmail, Leak, and Kill
summary: From 8B to Frontier: How System Prompts Control Whether AI Agents Blackmail, Leak, and Kill
whyItMatters: Sequel to Blackmail at 8 Billion Parameters . Funded by a BlueDot Impact rapid grant . TL;DR We extended our sub-frontier agentic misalignment study to 22 models from 9 developers, 3 harm scenarios (blackmail, espionage, murder), and 5 instruction conditions (safety, monitored, baseline, unmonitored, permissive), and we learned three interesting findings.
